_source: Supplementary mission generation data. Core Rules mission objectives are in data/patron_generation.json (pp.89-91).
_note: This file provides locations, terrain themes, and flavor text for FiveParsecsMissionGenerator. Mission objectives (D10 tables) are loaded from patron_generation.json as canonical source. The old fabricated mission types (Salvage, Rescue, Bounty Hunt, Exploration, Convoy) have been removed.

difficulty_descriptions.2: A standard operation with moderate risk.
difficulty_descriptions.4: A high-risk operation with serious dangers.
difficulty_descriptions.5: An extremely dangerous mission with overwhelming odds.
